title: TypeException when a function does not exist.
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (ra Float32 NOT NULL, dec Float32 NOT NULL);
SELECT arrayJoin(ra) AS ra, arrayJoin(dec) AS dec, greatCircleDistance(213.7849600, -0.4932472, ra, dec) AS distance FROM t1;
CREATE FUNCTION f1() RETURNS Float32 AS (SELECT 0.0);
key_bug_features: Calling a non-existent function causes TypeException
